---
layout: post-layout.njk
title: The Candle and the Dark
date: 2024-03-10
tags:
  - poems
---

I lit a candle in the dark,
a small and trembling thing,
that threw its shadow on the wall
and made the silence sing.

The flame bent low to every breath,
yet stubbornly held fast,
as if it knew that all great lights
must struggle ere they last.

So too the soul, in darkened rooms,
will flicker, dip, and sway —
but those who shield their candle well
shall see another day.
